p2p_enrich.notes:
Added 3 new pass_to_pass tests based on repo CI commands:
1. test_repo_python_syntax - Python syntax check via py_compile
2. test_repo_ruff_lint - Ruff linting on migrations/env.py
3. test_repo_alembic_ini_exists - Check alembic.ini exists

CI commands found from:
- .github/workflows/lint.yml (ruff linting)
- .github/workflows/py-tests.yml (pytest for enterprise)
- enterprise/Makefile (lint target)
- enterprise/dev_config/python/ruff.toml (ruff config)

rubric_enrichment.rejection_reasons: Rejected process rules about PR workflow, git best practices, lockfile management, and SDK pinning - not relevant to this Python migration code change. Rejected frontend/VSCode extension rules - not applicable to Python enterprise migrations.

validate.notes: Fixed test.sh path (changed /workspace/task/tests to /tests), fixed solve.sh to use Python for precise patching instead of sed, fixed test_outputs.py to check lock order within run_migrations_online() function only (avoiding false positive from run_migrations_offline())
